text: I will be attending ESSAI 2026 in Vienna — feel free to reach out if you'd like to meet up!
I will be attending HAICON 2026 with a poster on 'An AI System for Robust Plain Language Translation of Clinical Trials'.
I gave a talk on BioCroissant and how we can improve data standards for health AI at the AI4G Webinar series.
I have joined Sebastian Lobentanzer's group at Helmholtz Munich as a doctoral researcher!

My paper based on my master's thesis 'Accessible Language Simplification: Large Language Models for Generating Easy German' has been accepted at KI 2025! I will be attending the conference in Potsdam, Germany this September.
